title: Hiro's First Day with Animal Friends
synopsis: Hiro nervously starts his first day of school but discovers wonderful animal friends in his classroom who help him feel welcome and excited about learning.

pages.text: Today is Hiro's first day of school! He feels a little nervous walking into his new classroom. But look! There are friendly animals everywhere! A fluffy bunny hops by his desk. A colorful parrot sits on a perch by the window.

illustration.description: A classroom scene drawn in chalkboard style with white and colored chalk on a dark green board. Hiro with short straight black hair, light skin, bright dark brown eyes, round face stands at the entrance looking curious. A white bunny hops near wooden desks, and a bright red and blue parrot perches by a chalk-drawn window. Math equations and alphabet letters are doodled on the board background with dusty chalk texture.
illustration.alt: Hiro entering a classroom with animal friends

pages.text: The teacher, Mrs. Chen, introduces Hiro to all the animal friends. 'This is Benny the bunny, he loves to count carrots. And that's Polly the parrot, she helps us learn new words!' Hiro's eyes light up with excitement.

illustration.description: Chalkboard style drawing showing Mrs. Chen pointing to the animals. Hiro with short straight black hair, light skin, bright dark brown eyes, round face smiles widely. Benny the white bunny sits next to chalk-drawn carrots with numbers 1, 2, 3. Polly the colorful parrot has speech bubbles with simple words around her. School supplies and equations are sketched in the background with artistic warm dusty texture.
illustration.alt: Teacher introducing Hiro to the classroom animals

pages.text: During circle time, Hiro sits next to a gentle turtle named Tommy. Tommy moves slowly and helps everyone remember to take their time. A playful kitten named Kira purrs softly and shows Hiro how to hold his pencil correctly.

illustration.description: A circle time scene drawn in chalkboard style on dark green board with white chalk. Children sit in a circle with Hiro with short straight black hair, light skin, bright dark brown eyes, round face sitting next to a green turtle. A gray and white striped kitten demonstrates pencil holding with chalk-drawn paw prints around. ABC letters and simple math problems are doodled in corners with hand-drawn dusty texture.
illustration.alt: Hiro sitting with turtle and kitten during circle time

pages.text: At snack time, Hiro shares his apple with Benny the bunny. Polly the parrot teaches him to say 'please' and 'thank you' in different ways. By the end of the day, Hiro doesn't want to leave! 'I can't wait to come back tomorrow and learn more with my animal friends!' he tells his mom.

illustration.description: Snack time scene in chalkboard style with colored chalk on dark green board. Hiro with short straight black hair, light skin, bright dark brown eyes, round face shares a red chalk-drawn apple with white bunny Benny. Polly the parrot has colorful speech bubbles saying 'Please' and 'Thank you'. Other children and animals are gathered around small tables with school-themed doodles and equations scattered in background with artistic warm dusty texture.
illustration.alt: Hiro sharing snack with animal friends

metadata.illustrationStyle: chalkboard style, chalk drawings, dark green board, white and colored chalk, equations doodles, school themed, artistic warm, dusty texture, hand-drawn on board

questions.question: What is the name of the bunny in Hiro's classroom?
questions.explanation: The bunny's name is Benny, and he loves to count carrots!

questions.question: Which animal helps Hiro hold his pencil correctly?
questions.explanation: Kira the kitten purrs softly and shows Hiro how to hold his pencil correctly.

questions.question: What does Hiro share with Benny at snack time?
questions.explanation: Hiro shares his apple with Benny the bunny during snack time.

questions.question: How does Hiro feel at the end of his first day?
questions.explanation: Hiro is so excited about his animal friends that he can't wait to come back tomorrow!
